statement: AGENTS.md is a Linux-Foundation-stewarded single-file Markdown CONVENTION read natively by major agents; it is NOT an author-once-emit-to-many build system and adds no templating or security validation, so convergence on it shrinks the need for any emitter.

evidence.quote: A simple, open format... just standard Markdown. No JSON schema, no YAML, no special syntax. Stewarded by the Agentic AI Foundation under the Linux Foundation. Over 60,000 projects.
A README for agents... 21.9k stars. No multi-target emit, templating, or security validation in the convention.

falsifier: Evidence AGENTS.md spec adds a resolution/templating layer or that agents stopped reading it natively, re-creating the need for per-agent emit.
